channel.title: Blog | Almir Dev
channel.description: Reflections on technology, software and design.

item.title: Deploying Shortr: How I host Spring Boot, Redis, and Postgres for free on Railway
item.description: How to take a portfolio project out of localhost without spending a dime. A practical guide using the Railway platform.

item.title: Handcrafted Code in 2026?
item.description: Reflections on the practice of writing code by hand in 2026, amidst so many tools that automate.

item.title: Project: SOL-e - Automated Reference Extractor (Patented)
item.description: A patented tool that leverages web scraping to automate the extraction of BibTeX references from SBC Open Lib (SOL), enabling bulk processing of hundreds of articles simultaneously.

item.title: Project: Mercadim - Regional Marketplace
item.description: A digital platform designed to bridge the gap between local consumers and entrepreneurs, stimulating the regional economy through a free virtual storefront.

item.title: Project: Arântia Art - Serverless Portfolio & CMS
item.description: A dual-repo system featuring a multi-language portfolio and a custom CMS that utilizes the GitHub API as a database, achieving zero-cost infrastructure and full automation via GitHub Actions.
